description_long: This house is a large, multi-structure residential property set within a fenced lot, featuring a main building with a brick facade, arched windows, and a covered porch supported by columns. The property includes a spacious tennis court, a greenhouse, a gazebo, and several landscaped garden areas with trees and shrubs. The main house has a combination of flat and gable roofs, with multiple visible windows arranged in both symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns. Outdoor amenities such as a swimming pool, patio seating, and a driveway leading to the entrance enhance the luxurious feel. The lot is bordered by a tall fence and hedges, providing privacy and a sense of enclosure. The overall design blends traditional and modern elements, with a focus on recreation and outdoor living.
description: A large, multi-structure residential property with a brick main house, tennis court, greenhouse, gazebo, and landscaped gardens, all enclosed by a tall fence. The house features arched windows, a covered porch, and a mix of flat and gable roofs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main house with its brick facade, arched windows, covered porch, and the tennis court prominently in the foreground.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the tennis court, greenhouse, gazebo, and backyard amenities such as the pool and patio seating.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the house, the gazebo, garden areas, and the tennis court from a different angle.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the driveway, landscaped hedges, and the side of the main house with additional garden features.
attribute_window_arrangement: mixed symmetrical and asymmetrical rows with arched and rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a covered porch with columns, steps leading up, and a prominent front door framed by arched windows.
